items.title: Thus SpokeThe Gentlemen

mitre_tactics.name: Data Encrypted for Impact

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Thus SpokeThe Gentlemen
id: 4e2c6c1d-7073-5285-a12d-3e4b28db37bb
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Thus SpokeThe Gentlemen (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Thus SpokeThe Gentlemen
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/05
modified: 2026/06/05
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Thus SpokeThe Gentlemen — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-05T06:59:01Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Thus SpokeThe Gentlemen", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Thus SpokeThe Gentlemen Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6566194; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-05, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Phishing - high severity (Risk 7.0/10). [ALERT] CISA KEV CONFIRMED - actively exploited in the wild. Patch immediately. EPSS 94.12% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1486, T1078, T1059 (3 techniques). 71 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-IR-02. AI confidence: HIGH (81%) - strong data corroboration.
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — The State of Ransomware  Q1 2026
id: 44eb5a6f-1332-56a9-b05e-dc5641e7d17e
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to The State of Ransomware  Q1 2026 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RANSOMWARE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/The State of Ransomware  Q1 2026
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/05
modified: 2026/06/05
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_encrypt:
        TargetFilename|endswith:
            - '.locked'
            - '.encrypted'
            - '.crypted'
            - '.enc'
        EventID: 11
    selection_ransomnote:
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - 'README'
            - 'HOW_TO_DECRYPT'
            - 'RECOVER_FILES'
    selection_vssdelete:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
            - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete
falsepositives:
    - Encryption software (VeraCrypt, BitLocker) in use
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — The State of Ransomware  Q1 2026 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-05T06:59:01Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "The State of Ransomware  Q1 2026", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX The State of Ransomware  Q1 2026 Exploitation Attempt - RANSOMWARE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"vssadmin"; nocase; content:"delete shadows"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9641518; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-05, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
